arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola is brutally told why Man City have struggled this season
arts.sum: Harry Redknapp has spelt out why he thinks Premier League champs are so badly in the mire on six game winless run - and it's not good news for some of their squad

arts.ttl: ‘No’: Graeme Souness disagrees with what Simon Jordan has just said about Mo Salah at Liverpool
arts.sum: Liverpool may have to start planning for life without Mohamed Salah. Salah is a Liverpool legend, but his contract is up next summer, and, as...

arts.ttl: Liverpool v Man City: Five key areas that could decide the game
arts.sum: Liverpool have had more shots from fast breaks (20) than any other team in the Premier League this season, and rank second to Spurs (nine) for goals from such situations (five). In Premier League games only, just three teams - West Ham United, Brighton & Hove Albion, Crystal Palace - have allowed their opponents more chances from such situations this season than City (14).

arts.ttl: Arne Slot hit with major injury blow as Ibrahima Konate ruled OUT of Man City clash
arts.sum: Liverpool defender Ibrahima Konate has confirmed on social media that he is set for a spell on the sidelines after injuring himself against Real Madrid in midweek

arts.ttl: Ibrahima Konate suffers knee injury as Liverpool major fitness blow confirmed
arts.sum: Liverpool centre-back Ibrahima Konate is facing an extended period on the sidelines after suffering a knee injury against Real Madrid

arts.ttl: Ibrahima Konate provides injury update ahead of Liverpool's Premier League showdown against Manchester City after limping off against Real Madrid
arts.sum: Liverpool defender Ibrahima Konate is facing a spell on the sidelines after limping off after the win over Real Madrid on Wednesday night with a knee injury.

arts.ttl: ‘Hard’: Paul Merson has now predicted who will win – Liverpool or Manchester City
arts.sum: Liverpool face Manchester City this weekend in what is one of the Premier League’s great fixtures. The Reds and the Cityzens have been the biggest...

arts.ttl: Liverpool dealt blow as Konate ruled out of Man City clash
arts.sum: Liverpool have been dealt a big blow after Ibrahima Konate was ruled out of their crucial clash with Manchester City this weekend. Konate picked up an injury during the 2-0 win over Real Madrid on Wednesday night and is facing a spell on the sidelines. The extent of the Frenchman’s injury is not clear, […] The post Liverpool dealt blow as Konate ruled out of Man City clash first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: Ibrahima Konate has posted injury update which confirms he’s OUT vs. Man City
arts.sum: He had targeted Konate throughout his short stint on the pitch and now Konate faces a spell of recovery, as his post on Instagram on Friday afternoon confirmed. Ibrahima Konate has ruled himself out of featuring against Man City after posting an injury update on Instagram days after hobbling off the pitch with a knee injury.
